name: Crockpot Hungarian Goulash
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Round steak, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the steak cubes, onions, and garlic into the crockpot.
2. Stir in flour and mix to coat the steak cubes evenly.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except sour cream.
4. Stir well to combine.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours.
6. Stir sour cream into the goulash 30 minutes before serving.
> High setting can be used for 4 to 5 hours.
Serve over hot buttered noodles.
